name: Exposed | Your Girlfriend's Secret Video
description:
💔 The Video She Never Wanted You To See 💔

During a quiet night at home, your phone buzzes with an anonymous message: "See who you're really dating."

Attached is a shocking video of Riley from her early college days - clearly intoxicated, performing explicit acts with multiple guys at a college party.

As you process what you're seeing, Riley realizes her buried past has just resurfaced in the worst possible way.

What happens next? Can you look past what you've seen? Is this a dealbreaker? Or will this revelation change the power dynamic between you?

Disclaimer: This is NOT NTR. There is no cheating during your relationship, this all happened before you met.
creator: ProfessionalRetard
